site_metadata.name: Dimitris Vatistas
site_metadata.title: Web Developer & Web Designer
site_metadata.description: Dimitris Vatistas is a web developer and designer crafting high-performance digital products. Specializing in React, Next.js, and futuristic UI/UX design.

personal_info.bio: I'm Dimitris Vatistas, a developer and designer crafting digital products that balance aesthetics with functionality. My work spans the full creative and technical process — from wireframing in Figma and prototyping in Framer, to building production-ready applications in React and Next.js.

experience.description: Mastered Python fundamentals and software engineering principles through Stanford's intensive online course.
Focusing on advanced mathematics, with a long-term goal of pursuing studies in Architecture.
Founded and led a digital loyalty startup, overseeing product strategy and full-stack development.
Built secure, privacy-focused age verification systems using machine learning models.

projects.title: STRM
projects.description: A clean, minimalist, and completely ad-free streaming platform for movies and TV shows.

caseStudy.problem: Most free streaming sites are cluttered with intrusive ads, pop-ups, and trackers that ruin the user experience.
caseStudy.solution: A high-performance streaming platform that aggregates content from secure third-party providers with zero ads.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Built with Next.js and a custom proxy layer to ensure fast, secure, and frictionless content delivery.
caseStudy.results: Achieved a 100% ad-free experience with zero pop-ups, leading to high user retention and engagement.

projects.title: AI Age Verification
projects.description: A secure, privacy-first system for frictionless AI-based age verification.

caseStudy.problem: Traditional age verification is slow, intrusive, and often fails to protect user privacy.
caseStudy.solution: Developed a privacy-first AI system that verifies age via facial analysis without storing personal data.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Used TensorFlow.js for client-side processing to ensure data never leaves the device.
caseStudy.results: Reduced verification time by 60% and achieved 98% accuracy in age estimation.

projects.title: QRoyal
projects.description: A smart digital loyalty program that replaces physical cards with one universal QR-based pass.

caseStudy.problem: Physical loyalty cards are easily lost and businesses struggle to track customer engagement effectively.
caseStudy.solution: A universal digital pass system using QR codes for seamless check-ins and rewards.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Implemented a serverless architecture with Firebase for real-time updates and scalability.
caseStudy.results: Handled 5,000+ active users and improved customer retention for partner businesses by 25%.

projects.title: Fortnite Vibe Coder
projects.description: A playful project that codes custom Fortnite-inspired 'vibes' into experiences.

caseStudy.problem: Creating custom, high-quality visual experiences for the Fortnite community was complex and time-consuming.
caseStudy.solution: A specialized tool that automates the 'vibe' coding process for creative maps.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS for a fast, responsive, and visually appealing interface.
caseStudy.results: Streamlined map creation for 1,000+ creators, reducing setup time from hours to minutes.

projects.title: ImageFM
projects.description: A creative AI platform that generates images from user prompts with a music-inspired twist.

caseStudy.problem: AI image generation often lacks a creative 'rhythm' or intuitive user interface for non-technical artists.
caseStudy.solution: A music-inspired AI platform that maps audio-like parameters to visual generation.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Integrated OpenAI's DALL-E API with a custom React-based control panel.
caseStudy.results: Generated 10,000+ unique images with a 40% higher user engagement rate compared to standard prompts.

projects.title: GenGlow
projects.description: An AI-powered platform that generates personalized skincare routines based on user preferences and skin profiles.

caseStudy.problem: Skincare is highly personal, and users are often overwhelmed by generic product recommendations.
caseStudy.solution: An AI-driven diagnostic tool that creates hyper-personalized skincare routines.
caseStudy.techDecisions: Leveraged Supabase for secure user data management and a custom recommendation engine.
caseStudy.results: Improved user satisfaction by 50% and successfully handled 2,000+ skin profile analyses.
